reviews.review_description: The game is so good recomended playing with friends

developer_response.body:
Thank you!
Ape Ascent is made to be fun for friends!

reviews.review_description: This game is a must play for gorilla tag fans and people who want to have fun with friends. This is because the horror mode is well made and the only up is actually challenging which makes it so every time you fall you want to go higher since it tracks your score on a watch as you go up it and this game is only a few days old when writing this so there is so much time for the developer to improve it and also the items in the shop are actually good with a range of items including trails. Therefore this game is a must play trust me.

developer_response.body:
I can't say Ape Ascent is better than one of the best VR games of all time. But I can say that im very happy that you think that!
Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This game is perfect if you are looking for something new to play. It has amazing cosmetics and even an in game currency. I highly recommend it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks!
New Cosmetics are always being added. Maybe... 
This is to keep the game lively and so you can express yourselves more!
